name: ba-click-fx-extension
description: BA Click FX 的 Manifest V3 浏览器扩展。

scripts.build:all: npm run build:chromium && npm run build:firefox
scripts.check: node --test && node scripts/validate-build.mjs --target chromium && node scripts/validate-build.mjs --target firefox && node scripts/validate-store-assets.mjs && node scripts/encoding.mjs
scripts.package:chromium: npm run build:chromium && node scripts/package.mjs --target chromium
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && npm run lint:firefox && node scripts/package.mjs --target firefox
scripts.package:all: npm run build:all && npm run check:encoding && npm run lint:firefox && node scripts/package.mjs --target chromium && node scripts/package.mjs --target firefox && npm run package:firefox-source && node scripts/write-checksums.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build:all && npm run check
